name: How does the workers comp process work after I report my injury in Sandy?
description: Report, file Form 122, get approved care, appeal if denied within 30 days.[1]

mainEntity.name: How does the workers comp process work after I report my injury in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report, file Form 122, get approved care, appeal if denied within 30 days.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Employer files First Report (Form 122) within 7 days; you ensure it's filed, get authorized treatment, and receive medical/wage benefits if approved.[1] Carriers investigate; denials lead to appeals.[4] Key factors: follow treatment; cooperate with exams; light duty offers may reduce benefits if refused.[2] Track all docs and appeal denials within 30 days to a hearing.[1][4] Hire an attorney for disputes.
